---
title: "a03 Red Field Data"
author: "Angie Kochkarova"
format: html
---

# Introduction

This document analyzes seawater chemistry data to examine nutrient ratios
in Arctic Ocean samples.

# About the Data

The dataset was obtained from:

https://example.com/BGchem2008data.csv  

It was downloaded on February 9th 2026.

# Setup

```{r}
# Load required packages
library(readr)
library(here)

# Read the CSV file
bg_chem <- read_csv(here("data/BGchem2008data.csv"))
